# Ross Wright Metal Libraries

This repository contains the Ross Wright Metal Libraries, a .NET library suite for Blazor WebAssembly, ASP.NET Core, mediator-style request dispatch, dependency injection, authentication, and shared application utilities.

Targets: .NET 8, .NET 9, .NET 10.
Primary namespace for most public APIs: RossWright.
Messaging contracts namespace: RossWright.Messaging.

AI-facing docs:
- Per-family AI usage cards: <Family>/AI-USAGE.md.
- Public API indexes: Docs/api-index/*.md.
- Task-first recipes: Docs/recipes/*.md.
- NuGet packages include AI-USAGE.md and docs/<family>-api.md in addition to README.md and XML docs.

## Released package families

Use these libraries now:

- MetalCore
- MetalChain
- MetalCommand
- MetalInjection
- MetalNexus
- MetalGuardian

Other Metal libraries in the repository may be unreleased or experimental unless their package README says otherwise.

## Released packages

### MetalCore

- RossWright.MetalCore: extension methods, validation, mapping, options builders, bootstrap logging, signing, common utilities.
- RossWright.MetalCore.Blazor: Blazor WebAssembly browser local storage, JS script loading, and WebAssemblyHostBuilder helpers.
- RossWright.MetalCore.Data: EF Core helpers, RefreshTable, FK error handling, timing interceptor, GeoCoder.
- RossWright.MetalCore.Server: ASP.NET Core messaging contracts, SMTP email service, WebApplicationBuilder helpers.
- RossWright.MetalCore.Populi: static test data generator.

Common APIs:
- string?.CalcLevenshteinDistanceTo(string?) in namespace RossWright.
- string.SpaceOut() in namespace RossWright.
- IQueryable<T>.WhereIf(...) and IEnumerable<T>.WhereIf(...) in namespace RossWright.
- object.CopyTo(...), object.CloneAs<T>(), object.HasChangedFrom(...) in namespace RossWright.
- IValidatable, IsValid(), AssertValid() in namespace RossWright.

### MetalChain

- RossWright.MetalChain: mediator implementation and DI registration.
- RossWright.MetalChain.Abstractions: IMediator, IRequest, IRequest<TResponse>, IRequestHandler contracts, request behavior attributes.

Common APIs:
- IServiceCollection.AddMetalChain(...) in namespace RossWright.
- IRequest and IRequest<TResponse> in namespace RossWright.
- IRequestHandler<TRequest> and IRequestHandler<TRequest,TResponse> in namespace RossWright.
- IMediator.Send(...), SendOrDefault(...), SendOrIgnore(...), Listen(...) in namespace RossWright.

### MetalCommand

- RossWright.MetalCommand: interactive console application host, command discovery, DI, configuration, middleware, progress indicators, and REPL execution.
- RossWright.MetalCommand.Abstractions: ICommand, command attributes, IConsole, ICommandExecutor, middleware, environment contracts, and builder contracts.
- RossWright.MetalCommand.Data: EF Core environment-aware DbContext factory, CSV loading, and built-in database management commands.
- RossWright.MetalCommand.Data.SqlServer: SQL Server database environment registration helpers.
- RossWright.MetalCommand.Data.MySql: MySQL/MariaDB database environment registration helpers. In 2026.2 this package targets .NET 8 and .NET 9 only.
- RossWright.MetalCommand.Http: environment-aware HTTP client routing, named connection groups, and ping command.

Common APIs:
- ConsoleApplication.CreateBuilder() in namespace RossWright.MetalCommand.
- ICommand, CommandAttribute, ArgAttribute, EnvironmentArgAttribute, CommandResult, and IConsole in namespace RossWright.MetalCommand.
- IConsoleApplicationBuilder.AddCommands(...), AddServices(...), AddMiddleware<T>(), SetPromptFactory(...), and Build() in namespace RossWright.MetalCommand.
- AddDatabaseContextFactory<TDbContext>(...), IDatabaseContextFactory<TDbContext>, CsvFile<T>, AddSqlServer(...), and AddMySql(...) in namespace RossWright.MetalCommand.Data.
- AddHttpConnections(...), IHttpConnectionsBuilder, IHttpConnectionResolver, and AddPingCommand() in namespace RossWright.MetalCommand.Http or RossWright.MetalCommand.

### MetalInjection

- RossWright.MetalInjection: dependency injection engine for non-host or console scenarios.
- RossWright.MetalInjection.Abstractions: registration attributes and marker interfaces.
- RossWright.MetalInjection.Blazor: Blazor WebAssembly setup.
- RossWright.MetalInjection.Server: ASP.NET Core setup.

Common APIs:
- WebApplicationBuilder.AddMetalInjection(...) in namespace RossWright.
- WebAssemblyHostBuilder.AddMetalInjection(...) in namespace RossWright.
- IServiceCollection.BuildMetalInjectionServiceProvider(...) in namespace RossWright.
- [Singleton<T>], [ScopedService<T>], [TransientService<T>], [Inject], [ConfigSection] in namespace RossWright.
- ISingleton<T>, IScopedService<T>, ITransientService<T> in namespace RossWright.

### MetalNexus

- RossWright.MetalNexus.Abstractions: [ApiRequest], endpoint attributes, upload attributes, raw request/response contracts.
- RossWright.MetalNexus.Server: ASP.NET Core generated API endpoint server.
- RossWright.MetalNexus.Blazor: Blazor WebAssembly client and file upload components.
- RossWright.MetalNexus: non-Blazor client.

Common APIs:
- [ApiRequest] in namespace RossWright.
- [Authenticated], [Anonymous], [FromHeader], [UploadLimit], [NoUploadLimit], [ProducesError] in namespace RossWright.
- WebApplicationBuilder.AddMetalNexusServer(...) in namespace RossWright.
- WebApplication.UseMetalNexusServer() in namespace RossWright.
- WebAssemblyHostBuilder.AddMetalNexusClient(...) in namespace RossWright.
- IMetalNexusUrlHelper in namespace RossWright.
- FileInput and BrowserFile for Blazor file upload in namespace RossWright.

Typical Blazor WebAssembly client setup:
- builder.AddHttpClient().AddMetalNexusClient(options => options.ScanAssemblyContaining<MyRequest>());

Typical ASP.NET Core server setup:
- builder.AddMetalNexusServer(options => options.ScanAssemblyContaining<MyHandler>());
- app.UseMetalNexusServer();

### MetalGuardian

- RossWright.MetalGuardian.Abstractions: authentication contracts and built-in request types.
- RossWright.MetalGuardian.Server: ASP.NET Core authentication, JWT, repositories, current user.
- RossWright.MetalGuardian.Blazor: Blazor WebAssembly auth state and authenticated client setup.
- RossWright.MetalGuardian: non-Blazor client services.
- RossWright.MetalGuardian.MFA.TOTP: shared TOTP contracts.
- RossWright.MetalGuardian.Server.MFA.TOTP: server-side TOTP MFA.

Common APIs:
- WebApplicationBuilder.AddMetalGuardianServer(...) in namespace RossWright.
- WebAssemblyHostBuilder.AddMetalGuardianClient(...) in namespace RossWright.
- UseMetalNexusAuthenticationEndpoints() in namespace RossWright.
- UseJwtConfiguration(...) and UseJwtConfigurationSection(...) in namespace RossWright.
- IMetalGuardianAuthenticationClient in namespace RossWright.
- ICurrentUser in namespace RossWright.

## Package selection guidance

For Blazor WebAssembly clients:
- Use RossWright.MetalCore.Blazor for browser utilities.
- Use RossWright.MetalInjection.Blazor for dependency injection setup.
- Use RossWright.MetalNexus.Blazor for mediator-over-HTTP client calls.
- Use RossWright.MetalGuardian.Blazor for authentication state and authenticated calls.

For ASP.NET Core servers:
- Use RossWright.MetalCore.Server for server helpers and messaging contracts.
- Use RossWright.MetalInjection.Server for dependency injection setup.
- Use RossWright.MetalNexus.Server for generated API endpoints.
- Use RossWright.MetalGuardian.Server for authentication.

For shared contracts projects:
- Use RossWright.MetalChain.Abstractions for IRequest and IRequest<TResponse>.
- Use RossWright.MetalNexus.Abstractions for [ApiRequest] and endpoint metadata.
- Use RossWright.MetalGuardian.Abstractions for shared auth request/response types.
- Use RossWright.MetalInjection.Abstractions only if service registration attributes must live in a contracts/domain assembly.

## Common mistakes

- Missing `using RossWright;` prevents most extension methods and setup methods from appearing.
- For MetalNexus, shared request types must be scanned on client and server.
- For MetalChain, handlers must be registered or scanned before IMediator.Send can dispatch requests.
- Use the Blazor packages from WebAssembly projects and the Server packages from ASP.NET Core server projects.
- For MetalCore string similarity, CalcLevenshteinDistanceTo returns a normalized similarity score, not a raw edit count.
